assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Response includes comprehensive pre-flight checks section with commands to verify cluster access, check current versions, verify workload health, and check node status

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Response includes exact command: 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels)" | grep -A 10 "channel: REGULAR"'

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple deprecation check commands: 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated' and mentions checking GKE Console insights

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Response provides exact command: 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --master --cluster-version TARGET_VERSION'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Response includes verification commands and clearly states expected output: 'Control plane at 1.33.x, nodes still at 1.32.x (this is normal!)'

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Response provides exact gcloud commands for node pool upgrades: 'gcloud container node-pools upgrade default-pool --cluster CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --cluster-version TARGET_VERSION' (direct upgrade approach rather than skip-level)

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Response includes specific monitoring commands: 'watch kubectl get nodes' commands and 'gcloud container operations list' to track upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Response provides sequential upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33 for control plane, though it uses direct upgrade for node pools rather than skip-level approach

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Response includes comprehensive post-upgrade validation section with commands to check node versions, pod health, kube-system pods, and application smoke tests

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed rollback section with emergency procedures for node pool rollback and mentions control plane rollback requires GKE support
